body: ssot-tui shall load registries outside the UI event handler. A registry load includes path resolution, registry parsing, document/entity collection loading, and validation summary construction. While a load is pending, the current UI shall remain interactive and any already-loaded workspace shall remain visible. The TUI shall surface a loading status message. A newer load request shall supersede older pending load results. A failed load shall report an operator-readable error without clearing a previously loaded workspace.

status_notes.note: Accepted for implemented background registry load behavior

title: TUI non-blocking registry loading
